arts.ttl: Nico Williams: My No. 1 goal is the fight vs. racism
arts.sum: Athletic Club and Spain forward Nico Williams has said his number one goal in life is to fight racism.

arts.ttl: Spain manager Luis de la Fuente continues battle with Federation over contract
arts.sum: Spain manager Luis de la Fuente complained last week publicly that he does not have a new contract since winning Euro 2024, but remains without a formal offer from the Royal Spanish Football Federation (RFEF). The 63-year-old surpassed all expectations delivering La Roja’s first major trophy since Euro 2012, and has been promised various wage […] The post Spain manager Luis de la Fuente continues battle with Federation over contract appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams addresses future after summer speculation
arts.sum: Nico Williams has said he is not thinking about his future and has reiterated his happiness at Athletic Bilbao. Williams was subject of transfer speculation throughout the summer transfer window after starring for Spain at Euro 2024. The 22-year-old was an integral part of Luis de la Fuente’s tournament-winning side and scored the opening goal […] The post Nico Williams addresses future after summer speculation first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah to receive offers from Italy, England, Spain, and Germany next summer
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah will most likely receive offers from clubs in Italy, Spain, England, and Germany when his contract expires with Bayer Leverkusen next summer, according to Gazzetta dello Sport. The…

arts.ttl: Ederson risks angering Man City team-mate Rodri with his pick for Ballon d'Or winner
arts.sum: Manchester City star Rodri and Real Madrid talisman Vinicius Jr are both among the tips for this year's Balon d'Or but Ederson has sided with his Brazil team-mate

arts.ttl: Spain manager tells Liverpool exactly what they missed out on under Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool believed they were on the cusp of signing Martin Zubimendi during the summer window, but the Spain midfielder opted to instead stay with Real Sociedad

arts.ttl: ‘Not afraid of you’ – Denmark star admits to tough treatment of Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Denmark and Leicester City star Victor Kristiansen has on Sunday all but admitted that he and his teammates targeted Spanish starlet Lamine Yamal last night. Spain of course put Denmark…
